claimText: The Phenome India National Biobank was inaugurated at the CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB).
evidenceExcerpt: The Phenome India National Biobank was recently inaugurated at the CSIR-Institute of Genomics and Integrative Biology (IGIB).
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the host institution of the Phenome India National Biobank.
distractorHooks: Centre for Cellular and Molecular Biology (CCMB)
All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS)
